sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-signed-quantized conversion using Q15 scale and signed zero-point with Python-style round-to-even.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_gemm: Combinational signed integer GEMM over VLEN by K and K by VLEN tiles using centered quantized values.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantization to packed IEEE-754 FP32 bit patterns using combined Q15 scales.
